ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match went into overtime */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the match data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank in the league */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players on the team */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members */,
  "budget" REAL /* Team's budget */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Information about team sponsors */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the team data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the league is for */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season */,
  "league_champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that is the current champion */,
  "number_of_divisions" INTEGER /* Number of divisions in the league */,
  "number_of_playoffs_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams that qualify for the playoffs */,
  "playoff_format" TEXT /* Playoff format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the league data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_date" TEXT /* Date the stadium was built */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., open, retractable) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the stadium data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract ends */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coaching_licence" TEXT /* Type of coaching license */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the coach data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "signed_date" TEXT /* Date the player signed with the team */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract ends */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Details about any current injuries */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the player data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the access log data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player match statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "tpm" INTEGER /* Three-point shots made */,
  "tpa" INTEGER /* Three-point shots attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "or" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dr" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "tr" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "as" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "st" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "bl" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pfs" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the player match statistics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled match (e.g., scheduled, postponed, canceled) */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the match */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the schedule data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "parent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent team */,
  "child_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child team */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., youth team, reserve team) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the affiliation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the team affiliation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_affiliations_child_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_affiliations_parent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
